2026-06-23.patch_summary: This patch introduces a new function, page_counter_try_charge_stock(), which is a variant of the existing page_counter_try_charge() function. It first attempts to charge from per-cpu stock, then tries to refill the stock by overcharging up to the batch size if necessary, and finally charges exactly the requested number of pages if all else fails. The function reports back the number of pages charged to the caller, allowing for more efficient handling of memory limits.
